ml.earlyaccess.title: Members Early Access
ml.earlyaccess.modal.description: Early access to Gymshark Loyalty members first.
ml.earlyaccess.modal.terms.prefix: By continuing, you agree to Gymshark's

product.title: Running 5" Shorts
product.description:
LIGHTWEIGHT, REFLECTIVE RUNNING LAYERS

Whether you’re just ticking off your daily miles or training for a marathon, our running collection keeps you going with breathable, sweat-wicking fabrics, soft brushed linings and reflective details to keep you safe.

  • Adjustable internal drawcord waist
  • Ventilation waistband keeps you cool
  • Secure zipped back pocket for essentials
  • Angled hems & open overlapping side splits for more freedom of movement
  • Inner brief lining for comfort, support & breathability


SIZE & FIT

  • Regular fit
  • 6” inseam based on size M
  • Model is 6'1" and wears size M


MATERIALS & CARE

  • 86% Recycled Polyester, 14% Elastane


SKU: A3B9Q-BB2J

variants.title: Gymshark Running 5" Shorts - Deep Petrol Blue
Gymshark Running 5" Shorts - GS Stealth Blue

Values.ValueLabel: Weight / strength training (e.g. weight training, weightlifting, bodybuilding, powerlifting)

fullReviews.text: Looks good but it is like not even close to a XL... It hurts to use because it is so tight, and I use XL and XL in all my other running shorts so this one is just a lot smaller then normal
fullReviews.title: Way to small in size

gsResponse.Response: We're sorry to hear the fit wasn’t quite right, we completely understand how important it is to feel comfortable and supported in your gear. Please know your feedback has been noted and will be shared with our Product Team as we continue to work on improving sizing consistency.
gsResponse.Name: Customer Support

fullReviews.text: In real life the color is more greeny and less yellowy. I mainly ordered one for the beautiful pastel yellow color these pictures show but it's more of a neon green-yellow mix. I would not rate them as a product since I have only tried them on, just wanted make a comment on the color.
fullReviews.title: Color discrepancy

gsResponse.Response: We're delighted to hear that you're enjoying your Gymshark gear! We’re always listening and learning from feedback like yours, as it helps us improve in any way we can. This has been shared with our Product Team 🦈
gsResponse.Name: Gymshark

marketing.heading: Hey, Want Emails You’ll Actually Read?
marketing.paragraph: Here’s why joining the community will be the best decision you’ve made since you landed on our website.

usps.title: Events
usps.text: You’ll be the first to know about exclusive events at GSLC (Gymshark Lifting Club), our Lift events, and any others.

usps.title: Product Drops
usps.text: You’ll get early deets of when new products are gonna launch so you can mark your calendars.

usps.title: Exclusive Content
usps.text: Unlock promotions, discover what makes your Gymshark clothes so great, and learn all the ways you can style your pieces.

usps.title: 10% off
usps.text: And if you’re signing up for the first time, you’ll get 10% off your first order, too.
